---
title: "baia.seurat.helpers Workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{baia.seurat.helpers Workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# baia.seurat.helpers Workflow

## Representative workflow

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(baia.seurat.helpers)
factor_resolution(so)
prepare_so_merging(so1, so2)
```
